# Quality — Skill Group

Code review, security, performance, and quality assurance skills.

## Routing

Read the skill file based on the argument:

| Input | Skill file | What it does |
|-------|-----------|--------------|
| `review` | `skills/review.md` | Auto code review with high signal-to-noise ratio |
| `multi-model-review` or `thorough-review` | `skills/multi-model-review.md` | Multi-model consensus code review |
| `security-review` or `security` | `skills/security-review.md` | Repo-wide or feature-scoped security audit |
| `visual-verdict` or `visual` | `skills/visual-verdict.md` | Screenshot-based UI review |
| `perf-audit` or `perf` | `skills/perf-audit.md` | Performance audit and profiling |
| `pre-commit-check` or `pre-commit` | `skills/pre-commit-check.md` | Pre-commit validation checks |
| `designer` or `ui-spec` | `skills/designer.md` | UI specification and design review |
| `ai-slop-cleaner` or `clean-slop` | `skills/ai-slop-cleaner.md` | Detect and clean AI-generated slop |
| `ultraqa` or `qa` | `skills/ultraqa.md` | Comprehensive QA workflow |
| `deliverables` or `check-deliverables` | `skills/deliverables.md` | Verify deliverables completeness |
| `api-design` or `api` | `skills/api-design.md` | API design review and best practices |
| `critic` or `critique` | `skills/critic.md` | Critical analysis and feedback |

Read the matched skill file and execute its workflow.
